entities.name: NONSYMBIOTIC N2-FIXING BACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria that can fix atmospheric nitrogen independently of a symbiotic relationship with a host plant.

entities.name: ENZYME-LINKED IMMUNOSORBENT ASSAY
entities.description: A serological technique used for the detection and enumeration of specific antigens or antibodies.

entities.name: AZOSPIRILLUM LIPOFERUM
entities.description: A species of nonsymbiotic nitrogen-fixing bacteria.

entities.description: A species of nonsymbiotic nitrogen-fixing bacteria.

entities.description: A species of nonsymbiotic nitrogen-fixing bacteria.

entities.description: A species of nonsymbiotic nitrogen-fixing bacteria.

entities.name: ENTEROBACTER CLOACAE
entities.description: A species of nonsymbiotic nitrogen-fixing bacteria.

entities.name: ENTEROBACTER AEROGENES
entities.description: A species of nonsymbiotic nitrogen-fixing bacteria.

entities.name: SEROLOGICAL RELATIONSHIPS
entities.description: The study of immunological reactions between antigens and antibodies to determine taxonomic or strain relationships.

entities.name: ANTIGENS
entities.description: Specific molecular structures on the surface of bacteria that are recognized by antibodies.

entities.name: PEAT INOCULANTS
entities.description: A peat-based medium used for delivering bacterial inoculants to plants.

entities.name: BROTH CULTURE
entities.description: A liquid nutrient medium used for the cultivation of microorganisms.

entities.name: HEAT KILLED CELLS
entities.description: Bacterial cells that have been inactivated by heat, which can interfere with the ELISA reaction.
